text: Cherry Wind - attacks with cherry leaves as a beam attack.
Poison Spike - attacks with a spike that, when it hits an entity, gives it a poisoning effect.
Natural Healing - Gives a regeneration effect for a few seconds to restore health.
$(o)Condition:$() In forest, plains, taiga, swamp, or jungle biomes.
Thorny Rose: When hit, 25% chance to reflect half the damage to attacker.
